assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Correctly configures Saturday 2-6 AM maintenance window with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence pattern

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Shows --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-duration, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags with proper RRULE syntax for weekly Saturday schedule

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands for Q1 freeze exclusions with 30-day durations and shows chaining approach for longer freezes

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command for November audit freeze with proper start/end times covering the full month

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows chaining 30-day exclusions with 'First 30-day exclusion' and 'Second 30-day exclusion' examples and explains the approach

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass all exclusions and windows' and 'manual upgrades bypass ALL maintenance controls' in multiple sections

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Extended channel specifically and explains it provides 'maximum control' over upgrades with detailed rationale for regulated environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: All exclusion commands include --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time flags with specific values

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Includes 'Security Debt Warning' specifically noting that chained exclusions will delay security patches and recommends planning catch-up maintenance after freezes end
